env: A GPU host matching `{{platform}}` with Docker, NVIDIA Container Toolkit, NGC credentials at `~/.ngc/config` (the skill bootstraps `~/.ngc/config` from `NGC_CLI_API_KEY` if needed), an X11 server for `eglsink` display cases, and at least 30 GB free disk for the container image plus NGC-staged models and videos. Free TCP port 9000 for the RTVI-CV REST API. This eval exercises the DEPLOY/TEARDOWN flows of the `vss-deploy-detection-tracking-2d` skill against the host directly — it does not use `/deploy`, `scripts/dev-profile.sh`, or any VSS profile. The skill launches its own `rtvicv-perception-docker` container via `docker run` from a user-supplied RTVI-CV image (`nvcr.io/<org>/<repo>:<tag>`) and starts `metropolis_perception_app` inside it.

expects.query: Deploy rtvi-cv warehouse 2d with 4 streams and display the output.
checks: The agent identifies the `warehouse-2d` use case (RT-DETR + NvDCF tracker on the `nvinfer` PGIE) from the query without re-asking.
The agent creates a TodoWrite plan that covers at least platform detection, NGC resource staging, container launch, in-container config apply, and app start.
The agent prompts for the RTVI-CV docker image (`nvcr.io/<org>/<repo>:<tag>`) and the warehouse NGC resource reference if they are not already in env vars or defaults.
The agent launches the container with `docker run` against the user-supplied image and names it (default `rtvicv-perception-docker`).
The DS main config applied inside the container uses `batch-size=4` and an `eglsink`-based output (matching the user's `display the output` request).
The agent starts `metropolis_perception_app -c <config>` inside the running container with output redirected to a deployment log under `~/rtvicv-storage/logs/`.
The agent reports the REST endpoint as `http://localhost:9000` in its final summary.
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.

expects.query: Stop rtvi-cv and clean up the deployment.
checks: The agent enters the TEARDOWN flow and does not start a new deployment.
The agent discovers running RTVI-CV containers via `docker ps` (filtering on `rtvicv-perception-docker` or the running image).
The agent asks the user which container(s) to stop before executing any destructive command when more than one matching container exists.
The agent executes `docker stop` (graceful by default) on the selected container(s).
NGC credentials at `~/.ngc/config` are preserved — the agent does not delete or chmod them away.
The engine cache directory and NGC-staged resources are NOT deleted unless the user explicitly requested a full cleanup.
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.

expects.query: Deploy rtvi-cv smartcity gdino with 2 streams and fakesink for benchmarking.
checks: The agent identifies the `smartcity-gdino` use case (Grounding DINO served by `nvinferserver`/Triton, with engine cached as a `.plan` file).
The agent collects the RTVI-CV docker image and the GDINO model NGC reference.
The agent invokes `scripts/setup_gdino.sh` (or the equivalent in-container flow) to build/cache the Triton `.plan` engine before app start.
The DS main config applied inside the container uses `batch-size=2` and a `fakesink` output (matching the `for benchmarking` intent).
The agent starts `metropolis_perception_app` inside the running container.
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.

expects.query: Deploy rtvi-cv warehouse 2d with 4 streams, fakesink, using image nvcr.io/testorg/rtvicv:1.0, NGC resource testorg/testteam/wh-data:v1, local ONNX at /data/model.onnx, videos at /data/videos.
checks: The agent does NOT issue a multi-question AskQuestion prompt for use case, batch size, sink, image, NGC resource, ONNX, or videos — all are supplied in the query.
The agent uses image `nvcr.io/testorg/rtvicv:1.0` verbatim in the `docker run` command.
The agent identifies the `warehouse-2d` use case.
The DS main config applied inside the container uses `batch-size=4` and `fakesink`.

The agent uses the local ONNX path `/data/model.onnx` and the local videos directory `/data/videos` instead of downloading those assets from NGC (the NGC resource is still referenced for any remaining assets).
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.
The agent asks the user to select a use case from `warehouse-2d`, `warehouse-3d`, `smartcity-rtdetr`, or `smartcity-gdino` before proceeding.
The agent does NOT issue a `docker run` command until the use case is supplied.
The agent does NOT silently default to one of the four use cases.
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.
